mapper.select: SELECT id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload, status, retry_count, processing_token, processing_until, created_at, published_at FROM t_outbox_event WHERE aggregate_id = #{aggregateId} ORDER BY id

SELECT id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload, status, retry_count, processing_token, processing_until, created_at, published_at FROM t_outbox_event WHERE status = 'PENDING' OR (status = 'PROCESSING' AND processing_until < NOW()) ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit}
